inputs.label: Project Duration (days)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 9001:2015 project planning; typical welding project durations range from 1 day to 1 year.

inputs.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Industry benchmark from AWS (American Welding Society) and BLS data; skilled welder rates vary by region.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Based on welding consumables and base metal costs; ASTM material specifications.

inputs.label: Units to Weld
inputs.businessContext: Project scope; typical batch sizes in fabrication.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Six Sigma quality metric; acceptable defect rate <0.05 for standard welding; ISO 3834 quality requirements.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Includes labor, material, and overhead for rework; typical 50-100% of original cost.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs; typical 15-30% in fabrication shops; based on activity-based costing.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Target (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin; industry average 10-20% for welding projects.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy; used for risk adjustment; based on historical data quality.

inputs.label: Bid Type
inputs.businessContext: Contract type; fixed price transfers risk to contractor, cost-plus reduces risk.

rules: if bidType == 'fixed' then profitMarginTarget >= 0.1 else profitMarginTarget >= 0.05

thresholds.defectRate: if defectRate > 0.05 then 'CRITICAL: Defect rate exceeds acceptable limit (5%). Consider process improvement.'
thresholds.profitMarginTarget: if profitMarginTarget < 0.1 then 'WARNING: Low profit margin target may indicate insufficient risk premium.'
thresholds.dataConfidence: if dataConfidence < 0.7 then 'WARNING: Low data confidence; results may be unreliable.'

hiddenLossDrivers: if defectRate > 0.05 then 'High defect rate leading to excessive rework costs.'
if overheadRate > 0.3 then 'Overhead rate above typical range; review indirect costs.'
if dataConfidence < 0.7 then 'Low data confidence increases risk of underestimation.'
suggestedActions: if defectRate > 0.05 then 'Implement quality improvement program (e.g., Six Sigma) to reduce defect rate.'
if profitMarginTarget < 0.1 then 'Increase profit margin target to cover risk, especially for fixed-price bids.'
if dataConfidence < 0.7 then 'Collect more accurate data or apply higher contingency.'
if bidType == 'fixed' then 'Consider adding a contingency allowance for unforeseen costs.'
